subQuestions.label: a)
subQuestions.text: If m balls are distributed among a men and b women, show that the probability that the number of balls received by men is odd is (1/2)[((b+a)^m - (b-a)^m)/(b+a)^m].

subQuestions.label: b)
subQuestions.text: Two independent random variable X and Y are both normally distributed with means 1 and 2 and standard deviations 3 and 4 respectively. If Z = X - Y, write the pdf of Z and find P[Z+1 ≤ 0].
